prompt: Resolve the field tradeoff: distinguish common shortcuts from acceptable journeyman practice.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is E-301 Conductor selection & sizing within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.3 Wire & Cable. The observed field condition is: undersized for load + length (voltage drop). The work is being assessed at the in-progress lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 310, Table 310.16.
title: T4 E-301 Tradeoff judgment
